leadText: Tombolo Walk (Japanese: トンボロ道 Tombolo Path) is an area located in the southeastern waters of the Cobalt Coastlands of Hisui. It is located just to the southeast of Sand's Reach and Deadwood Haunt.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Tombolo Walk is a collection of three islands that sit a short distance from the southeastern shore of Sand's Reach. The largest of the three islands is the farthest from the shore. The other two islands are similar in size and shape and are between the shore and the biggest island. The islands themselves are connected by a shallow sandbar, which covers the entire area between all of the islands. Another sandbar connects from one of the small islands to the southernmost "finger" of Sand's Reach.
